overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy game showing a player character in red robes and a tall hat walking through ancient stone ruins. The character is accompanied by a large furry humanoid creature through a narrow corridor, then enters an open courtyard to engage in combat with undead skeletal enemies near a bonfire.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor between high castle walls

events.description: large furry creature moves to the right and exits the narrow path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow stone corridor following the large furry creature

notable_agents.action: large furry humanoid creature with a club walking ahead, then moving aside

entered.detail: tall gray stone block wall forming the left boundary of the corridor
tall gray stone block wall forming the right boundary of the corridor
round stone tower with crenellations visible in the distance
patches of golden yellow grass growing between stone tiles
scattered broken stone blocks and debris along the path

segments.scene_description: The player character walks through a narrow stone corridor between high castle walls, following a large furry humanoid creature. The path is lined with yellow grass patches and rubble, with a stone tower visible ahead against an overcast golden sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone walkway approaching a stairway

events.description: character begins ascending the stone stairs at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: continuing through the corridor alone, navigating around rubble toward the ascending stairs

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading upward to the next level
stone archway with decorative carvings on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds alone through the remaining stretch of corridor, passing scattered rubble and stone debris. The path leads to a wide stone staircase ascending upward, with the distant tower now passing out of view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with bonfire and wooden furniture

events.description: exiting narrow corridor into open courtyard area with bonfire
engaging undead skeletal enemies near the central bonfire

agents.ego_description: entering the courtyard and engaging in melee combat with undead skeletal enemies, dodging and attacking

notable_agents.action: undead skeletal creature with sword attacking the player near the bonfire
second undead enemy crouching and rising from the ground near the wall

entered.detail: burning wooden tripod bonfire with orange flames
long wooden dining table with benches
scattered wooden benches and furniture around the courtyard
tall natural rock face forming the back wall of the courtyard
lower stone walls enclosing the courtyard area

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stairs and emerges into an open courtyard enclosed by stone walls and a rocky cliff face. A burning bonfire illuminates the center near wooden tables and benches. Undead skeletal enemies emerge and engage the player in combat.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard combat area and upper exit stairs

events.description: character disengages from combat and moves toward the exit stairs

agents.ego_description: finishing combat with remaining undead enemies and moving toward the upper exit stairs

notable_agents.action: undead enemy retreating near the far wall

entered.detail: stone staircase leading up and out of the courtyard
arched stone doorway at the top of the exit stairs

segments.scene_description: The player continues fighting in the courtyard, moving around the bonfire area. After dispatching enemies, the character turns toward the exit stairs at the far end of the courtyard, leaving the wooden furniture and bonfire behind as they approach the stone archway leading upward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic stone corridor into a wide, combat-filled courtyard under an overcast golden sky. It begins with the player character following a large furry humanoid through a narrow passage lined with yellow grass and rubble, moving toward a distant stone tower. As the companion disappears, the camera proceeds alone past scattered debris and ascends a wide stone staircase, leaving the tower behind. The scene then opens into a spacious courtyard enclosed by rocky cliffs, where the lighting shifts to the glow of a central bonfire as undead skeletal enemies emerge to engage the player in combat. Finally, the camera tracks the character through the skirmish and around the wooden furniture before turning toward a stone archway leading further upward.
